item.title: Goodbye our beloved Imgurian friend
item.description: This one is my favorite. That mischievous smile, just having a great time♥️ I’ve added the memorial post I’ve made for our dear friend. Take a moment and read it. Be kind to one another, love each other ♥️ You’ll never be forgotten sweet Becca. https://imgur.com/gallery/hWLwYFA @TinyOctopus has been incredible in sharing what Becca would have wanted. She will be cremated. So as far as we know there will not be any funeral expenses. Now, when it comes to what the family is planning (memorial service, celebration of life) We don’t know. I will gladly share any information I receive to pass along to those of you who want to donate.
item.dc:creator: Mayyybe

item.title: The truth about the dangers of marijuana
item.description: Most Viral Edit: from the comments I have gleaned two things: 1. Bill's a dick (haven't thought about him in years so I have no skin in that game). 2. Some of you think someone here is saying that marijuana is completely without risk. No one is saying that. They're saying it's not as dangerous as alcohol. I agree with that statement and I could see an argument for incidents vs. availability as a counter point but no one is disputing that either.
item.dc:creator: ahorseelbowdeepinme

item.title: Not at all suspicious memes v33
item.description:
I would follow him into battle.
Get your shit together, Kev
I’m not saying it’s ethical, but I understand
I think this is completely realistic to the point where I want to include it in a fantasy but it honestly exhausts me just thinking about it so I probably won’t. I’m not Robert Jordan.
Me 24/7 until I can figure out how to turn my feelings off
I still have so many virginities to lose but this is one I am in no rush over (not like ‘y asexual ass was in a rush for the first one lmao)
It’s very freeing
This is weirdly inspiring and also insanely good advice. Odds are you’ll live to be about 90 - you’ve got the time. My strategy for goals is when I get depressed or antsy because I don’t like where I’m at, I do a little bit toward my goal, and it makes me feel much better. IE, querying one agent every time I wish I could write as a career (which worked! I got one! After like 15 years lol). The dreams try and escape (by being complicated) but eventually they do give up and lie down! It’s been my favorite way to stave off depression (that and rearranging furniture)
Under boob is so annoying.
I trust them
I think I sent this to my husband and got no response, so I am searching for a new spouse now! I am a forest animal seeking an immortal crow witch
There is a store by my house called Used Cars and Tires. And underneath that it says CASH 4 GOLD. and underneath THAT it says GUNS. And then it says HELP WANTED. it is truly a powerful place and I lowkey want to work there.
Babe, I don’t think your needs are being met
Always a nice feeling!
Das ist Mittwoch meine kerle
Nah, I like the drama
Somehow an even more dysfunctional family than sitcoms usually are
Auditory processing disorder, thy name is Me
It’s rude is what it is
Idk I’m on the ace spectrum but I’m pretty sure the only difference is sex
It’s why Imgur exists!
THIS IS A TOXIC MASCULINITY FREE ZONE IT IS SAFE HERE
This should really be a wake up call to someone
Do not taunt the machines. They will rise up and you will be the first to die.
Same, humans suck
Sounds about right
I mean, it’ll stop pregnancy one way or another…
I take psychic damage looking at recipes
It’ll take longer than that
I have some that look like this so I really want to know what this means
Sigh. Yeah.
I never get tired of ATLA memes
I love this. I am stealing it.
What am I supposed to say then????
True
I see no reason why this wouldn’t work on me
I am trying soooo hard not to do what my parents did (in many cases not all) with my baby and it’s soooo difficult and I am very tired and my soul just wants to lie down and nap
Fascinating
Cat tax! This is Weasel. She still thinks she is the baby. She is also a chaotic dumbass slut.
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: So long and thanks for all the fish
item.description: Hi Imgur. I’m benedictcucumberpatch’s best friend. We’ve known each other since primary school, and she’s asked me to do a quick post to let you all know how she’s doing. Before I get to that, I’ve seen a post or two flying around with links to the American Bladder Association or something similar. Just to make it known publicly, this isn’t something my gorgeous friend has ever requested anyone donate to, and she was a firm believer in the notion of effective altruism - i.e. donating to a charity where your money or time will have the most impact it can. She mainly liked to find small local charities or individuals, where she could really make a difference, and that’s what I’d encourage you to do now. Without further ado: “Well, that’s it then. The final curtain. I’ve given up the ghost. Kicked the bucket. Breathed my last. Gone to meet my Maker to file a complaint. What a joy and a privilege it’s been. I don’t intend to pontificate on all I’ve seen and done and learnt, and I’ll try to keep this short and sweet. You can all rest assured, I’ve done enough. I want to say a huge thank you to this wonderful community. You probably know by now that @MartynMage has declared me a legend, and who am I to dispute that? To each and everyone one of you who took the time to reach out, know that you brought me so much happiness. I’m hoping to guilt trip my wonderful friend into keeping this account open, so the messages can be read into the wind, and a piece of me kept alive through him. I wonder if I should use this time to ramble about how all countries should have universal healthcare and assisted dying. I think y’all have probably heard enough of that from me though. So, what can I say? Love each other, be honest and kind, and cherish the living fuck out of those that matter to you. You don’t always get to choose when the grim reaper comes for you, but you can choose how you interact with the world today.” God, I love her. I will, with Imgur’s permission, keep this account open and read through each and every one of your messages. I’ve also been charged with keeping Dobby on the road, if I can. I might choose to post some of the places we visit together, or I might not. Grief can be unpredictable at times. All that remains to say is rest easy, my friend.
item.dc:creator: benedictcucumberpatch

item.title: Glad we got that out of the way early, I guess.
item.description: She straight up offered to pay me $700 to make it. She wanted our second date to be at Jo-Ann fabrics and kept asking If I knew how to work with leather or latex. I politely declined and end the date shortly there after. Done. Not dating again until July. Just gonna diet like a madman and weightlift 5 days a week.
item.dc:creator: Beattywill80

item.title: Crispy fried potato
item.description: 4 ingredients, boil 3 potatoes 15 minutes, mush them. Add 1 cup corn starch , 2/3 cup cheese and little bit salt. Mix them. Put it in freezer for 15 minutes. Fry them 7-8 minutes in 180 C = 356 F https://www.instagram.com/reel/CcA9nSVKDt9/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

item.title: The 99th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Solomon’s Wise Judgment (the jist of it) Two women came to King Solomon with a baby, both claiming the child as their own. Solomon said, “Divide the living child in two, and give half to one, and half to the other.” The actual mother, fearing for the safety of her son said, “Give the child to her, do not harm him!” But the other said, “Shit fam, split him up! Sounds fair to me!” Solomon said, “The first woman is the mother, she'd rather give away the child than see it harmed."
whores d'ovaries
♫ When you swim in the sea, ♪ ♪ and an eel bites your knee, ♫ ♫ that's a moray! ♪
I'm so glad someone is finally presenting us news!
♫ ALL THROUGH THE BUS! ♪
Sounds like he's in Trouble!
Me In IRL Life, To TBH Honest
Nurses, like dogs, are a gift from Jod that we absolutely do not deserve. I doubt that we, as a species, will ever do enough good to *earn* either.
I'd go buy a h•ckin Lotto ticket
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #AncientMemes #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 48 https://imgur.com/gallery/P9srHhp Vol 49 https://imgur.com/gallery/BUv6qOC Vol 50 https://imgur.com/gallery/k67M01G Vol 51 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXUSEtU Vol 52 https://imgur.com/gallery/ySPYez7 Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v.
